prompt: Add or verify a demo-safe ToolExecutor boundary that records read-only tool execution without granting mutating side effects by default. Do not include a finished patch in the prompt.
expected_evidence: Tool execution record is emitted for read-only work.
Mutating side effects require explicit policy.
Executor output can be joined without exposing secrets.
contamination_notes: Synthetic dirty-dozen harness task; contains no customer data, benchmark answer, or patch solution.
